visa_types.name: Participation in cultural or sporting events
visa_types.documents_required:
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)
Application for Schengen Visa - Swedish Version (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3pMu3zfQJqZDCSVV3Fcrr7/000c957ea8f3d44458ba7f5b42d2b4b5/Swedish-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf)
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Checklist for Participation in cultural or sporting events (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7Ax8YJMlgR7r3vF2fgMc0p/f4dd481694f51bcf267f1c794131c7cf/check-list-english-updated-23-11-24.pdf)
Checklist for Iraqi Citizens living in Iraq (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4Ljcui92VkarOPtzfJAjsw/95934069e970cdf19ef5b265c5ff42b9/New-check-list-english-iraqi-citizen-final.pdf) 
When a child travels with one parent (or alone)

When a minor travels with one parent or alone a so-called “consent letter for minors travelling abroad” is needed. 
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1MvZDo9IinSH7MoxooWLW4/101fd5e1413c8896a66666204b193991/consent-for-underage-children.pdf) to download consent letter
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Business]
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at Sweden Visa Application Centre, Amman with service fee of 9 Euros (equivalent in JOD)
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[Table:Buisness]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Jordanian Dinar
- Fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time: The processing at the Embassy of Sweden normally takes 10 -14 days, but may in some cases take up to a month (or longer).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to apply for a visa for Sports or cultural events.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to apply for a visa for Sports or cultural events.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business]
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at Sweden Visa Application Centre, Amman with service fee of 9 Euros (equivalent in JOD)
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[Table:Buisness]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Jordanian Dinar
- Fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required

## All documents submitted must be in English language.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)
Application for Schengen Visa - Swedish Version (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3pMu3zfQJqZDCSVV3Fcrr7/000c957ea8f3d44458ba7f5b42d2b4b5/Swedish-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf)
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Checklist for Participation in cultural or sporting events (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7Ax8YJMlgR7r3vF2fgMc0p/f4dd481694f51bcf267f1c794131c7cf/check-list-english-updated-23-11-24.pdf)
Checklist for Iraqi Citizens living in Iraq (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4Ljcui92VkarOPtzfJAjsw/95934069e970cdf19ef5b265c5ff42b9/New-check-list-english-iraqi-citizen-final.pdf) 
When a child travels with one parent (or alone)

When a minor travels with one parent or alone a so-called “consent letter for minors travelling abroad” is needed. 
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1MvZDo9IinSH7MoxooWLW4/101fd5e1413c8896a66666204b193991/consent-for-underage-children.pdf) to download consent letter

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Sweden normally takes 10 -14 days, but may in some cases take up to a month (or longer).

## Download Form

Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)
Schengen Visa Checklist
Consent letter for minors travelling

To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)

The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorised translator.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to visit Sweden for tourism for a period of maximum 3 months..
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to visit Sweden for tourism for a period of maximum 3 months..
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business]
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at Sweden Visa Application Centre, Amman with service fee of 9 Euros (equivalent in JOD)
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[Table:Buisness]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Jordanian Dinar
- Fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required

## If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden as a tourist, you need the documents listed below.

## All submitted documents must be in English language.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)
Application for Schengen Visa - Swedish Version (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3pMu3zfQJqZDCSVV3Fcrr7/000c957ea8f3d44458ba7f5b42d2b4b5/Swedish-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf)
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorised translator.
Checklist for Tourist Visa
Checklist for Iraqi Citizens living in Iraq (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4Ljcui92VkarOPtzfJAjsw/95934069e970cdf19ef5b265c5ff42b9/New-check-list-english-iraqi-citizen-final.pdf) 
When a child travels with one parent (or alone)
When a minor travels with one parent or alone a so-called “consent letter for minors travelling abroad” is needed.
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1MvZDo9IinSH7MoxooWLW4/101fd5e1413c8896a66666204b193991/consent-for-underage-children.pdf) to download consent letter

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Sweden normally takes 10 -14 days, but may in some cases take up to a month (or longer).

## Download Form

Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)
Schengen Visa Checklist
Consent letter for minors travelling

visa_types.processing_time: The processing at the Embassy of Sweden normally takes 10 -14 days, but may in some cases take up to a month (or longer).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Sweden for a maximum of 3 months for business purposes. Please note that if you are going to work for a period less than 3 month you
                                                                    will need both a work permit and a Schengen visa and if that is the case you should contact the Embassy of Sweden for consultation.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Sweden for a maximum of 3 months for business purposes. Please note that if you are going to work for a period less than 3 month you
                                                                    will need both a work permit and a Schengen visa and if that is the case you should contact the Embassy of Sweden for consultation.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business]
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at Sweden Visa Application Centre, Amman with service fee of 9 Euros (equivalent in JOD)
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[Table:Buisness]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Jordanian Dinar
- Fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
All documents submitted must be in English language.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.

Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf) 
Application for Schengen Visa - Swedish Version 

Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorised translator.
Checklist for Business Visa 
Checklist for Iraqi Citizens living in Iraq (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4Ljcui92VkarOPtzfJAjsw/95934069e970cdf19ef5b265c5ff42b9/New-check-list-english-iraqi-citizen-final.pdf)
When a child travels with one parent (or alone)
When a minor travels with one parent or alone a so-called “consent letter for minors travelling abroad” is needed.
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1MvZDo9IinSH7MoxooWLW4/101fd5e1413c8896a66666204b193991/consent-for-underage-children.pdf) to download consent letter

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Sweden normally takes 10 -14 days, but may in some cases take up to a month (or longer).

## Download Form

Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)
Schengen Visa Checklist
Consent letter for minors travelling

## Visa Fees

Please Note:

- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[Table:Buisness]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Jordanian Dinar
- Fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required

## If you apply for a visa to visit relatives and friends, you need the documents listed below (in English language).
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)
Application for Schengen Visa - Swedish Version (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3pMu3zfQJqZDCSVV3Fcrr7/000c957ea8f3d44458ba7f5b42d2b4b5/Swedish-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf)
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator.
Checklist for Visiting Family and Friends
Checklist for Iraqi Citizens living in Iraq (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4Ljcui92VkarOPtzfJAjsw/95934069e970cdf19ef5b265c5ff42b9/New-check-list-english-iraqi-citizen-final.pdf) 
When a child travels with one parent (or alone)
When a minor travels with one parent or alone a so-called “consent letter for minors travelling abroad” is needed.
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1MvZDo9IinSH7MoxooWLW4/101fd5e1413c8896a66666204b193991/consent-for-underage-children.pdf) to download consent letter

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Sweden normally takes 10 -14 days, but may in some cases take up to a month (or longer).

## Download Form

Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)
Schengen Visa Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7Ax8YJMlgR7r3vF2fgMc0p/f4dd481694f51bcf267f1c794131c7cf/check-list-english-updated-23-11-24.pdf) 
Invitation Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5nt0CeR5Iwl2DpfAS6Uitp/d4ee717299e21bbc679c65e59daf208e/New-Invitation-241011_Inbjudan_en.pdf) 
Consent letter for minors travelling

visa_types.name: Medical treatment
visa_types.documents_required:
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)
Application for Schengen Visa - Swedish Version (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3pMu3zfQJqZDCSVV3Fcrr7/000c957ea8f3d44458ba7f5b42d2b4b5/Swedish-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf)
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
You must have:
- A completed and signed
 
application form no. 119031 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1l26hQd6AKvMOrGKBqTdbZ/ced85f3d689a72e0d6ca53ade020b292/Application-Schengen.pdf), 
, Application for Schengen Visa.
- A valid passport or travel document.

- This must:
- Be valid for at least three months after your departure from the Schengen area
- Contain at least two empty pages
- Have been issued during the past ten years.
- Two photographs in passport format and color, taken straight from the front and no older than six months.
- A round trip booking (the ticket to be bought only after the visa has been issued)
- Proof of accommodation (if it is a visit to relatives and friends it is enough if the referent states that he/she will provide accommodation in the invitation form)
- Individual medical insurance covering the cost of emergency treatment and transport home for medical reasons. Read more under ‘Medical travel insurance’
- Enough money to support yourself during your stay. A bank statement in English verifying that funds for the stay are available, it has to show transactions for the last six (6) months. In general, Sweden requires you to have SEK 450 per day/person. The required amount may be less if for instance you have paid for board and lodging in advance or live with friends or relatives. If the person who is inviting you to Sweden will be paying for your support, you must show in the same way that he/she has enough money to do so.
- Documents that are specifically associated with the type of visit you are planning. Check under the relevant heading in the menu on the left.
Anyone who is not a Jordanian citizen must show a residence permit or proof of residence in Jordan.

The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator.
- Two passport photographs in which you are looking straight ahead and which are not more than six months old
- A medical certificate from Sweden showing when you will receive your treatment and what it entails
- A medical certificate from the country in which you are resident, showing that you cannot obtain the treatment there
- Proof that you have deposited money in Sweden for the planned treatment and any aftercare
Upon your visit the embassy might ask you to fill out form 239011 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2LFtvb1tEypFHhVEBl0pgT/6527928f0057d4d0c5383d0d1a8cbee6/bl_fam_180316.pdf), , the Family details, otherwise the embassy might need to set up another appointment to perform an interview.
When a child travels with one parent (or alone)
When a minor travels with one parent or alone a so-called “consent letter for minors travelling abroad” is needed.
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1MvZDo9IinSH7MoxooWLW4/101fd5e1413c8896a66666204b193991/consent-for-underage-children.pdf) to download consent letter

Overview

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to apply for a visa for Medical Treatment.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business]
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at Sweden Visa Application Centre, Amman with service fee of 9 Euros (equivalent in JOD)
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[Table:Buisness]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Jordanian Dinar
- Fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required

## All documents submitted must be in English language.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)
Application for Schengen Visa - Swedish Version (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3pMu3zfQJqZDCSVV3Fcrr7/000c957ea8f3d44458ba7f5b42d2b4b5/Swedish-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf)
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
You must have:
- A completed and signed
 
application form no. 119031 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1l26hQd6AKvMOrGKBqTdbZ/ced85f3d689a72e0d6ca53ade020b292/Application-Schengen.pdf), 
, Application for Schengen Visa.
- A valid passport or travel document.

- This must:
- Be valid for at least three months after your departure from the Schengen area
- Contain at least two empty pages
- Have been issued during the past ten years.
- Two photographs in passport format and color, taken straight from the front and no older than six months.
- A round trip booking (the ticket to be bought only after the visa has been issued)
- Proof of accommodation (if it is a visit to relatives and friends it is enough if the referent states that he/she will provide accommodation in the invitation form)
- Individual medical insurance covering the cost of emergency treatment and transport home for medical reasons. Read more under ‘Medical travel insurance’
- Enough money to support yourself during your stay. A bank statement in English verifying that funds for the stay are available, it has to show transactions for the last six (6) months. In general, Sweden requires you to have SEK 450 per day/person. The required amount may be less if for instance you have paid for board and lodging in advance or live with friends or relatives. If the person who is inviting you to Sweden will be paying for your support, you must show in the same way that he/she has enough money to do so.
- Documents that are specifically associated with the type of visit you are planning. Check under the relevant heading in the menu on the left.
Anyone who is not a Jordanian citizen must show a residence permit or proof of residence in Jordan.

## If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden for the purpose of receiving medical treatment, you need the documents listed below.
The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator.
- Two passport photographs in which you are looking straight ahead and which are not more than six months old
- A medical certificate from Sweden showing when you will receive your treatment and what it entails
- A medical certificate from the country in which you are resident, showing that you cannot obtain the treatment there
- Proof that you have deposited money in Sweden for the planned treatment and any aftercare
Upon your visit the embassy might ask you to fill out form 239011 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2LFtvb1tEypFHhVEBl0pgT/6527928f0057d4d0c5383d0d1a8cbee6/bl_fam_180316.pdf), , the Family details, otherwise the embassy might need to set up another appointment to perform an interview.
When a child travels with one parent (or alone)
When a minor travels with one parent or alone a so-called “consent letter for minors travelling abroad” is needed.
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1MvZDo9IinSH7MoxooWLW4/101fd5e1413c8896a66666204b193991/consent-for-underage-children.pdf) to download consent letter

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Sweden normally takes 10 -14 days, but may in some cases take up to a month (or longer).

## Download Form

Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dXHtarCVvA2EYTt7RdEhB/9c1fa1c3e06d0af737237ee16c8031cb/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf)
Schengen Visa Checklist
Consent letter for minors travelling
